text_block_list.text:
The Spring Fan Fest is here, and the popular
model Gold City is expected to be inundated by
her fans.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We've gathered your fans in the gym. I'm leaving
the rest to the host. Go check on her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If you wanna say something, say it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't know, it's just funny to see you working
hard like this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're usually on the rooftop just killing time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Busy day. I need to get going.
choice_data_list: Are you guys not on good terms?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not good, but not bad either.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, when I need to go somewhere and be
alone, I run into her slacking off.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Forget about that now, though. I've got fans
waiting, so let's go.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh! Cityyyy!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming, everyone. So...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Quiet, everyooone! You there, stay in line!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So you're the host, Bamboo. Can you handle this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, who do you think I have to deal with on the
daily?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If I can handle you, you big troublemaker, I can
handle—

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Omigod, what a photo op! Bamboo, City! Look
this way!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Do an UmaTok! Do a Q and A!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: W-wait, me too?! No, I'm just the host, so...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Come on, why not? It isn't like you to shy away.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm not shying away! It's just that today is
supposed to be your day...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But oh well... I guess I can't argue with the star of
the show! I present to everyone, the City and
Bamboo talk special!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're so easy...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we're taking questions from the audience!
Raise your hand if you've got one!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I've got one! You two share a room, right? Is
there anything about each other that only the two
of you know?

text_block_list.name: City and Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Um.
Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Something only I know? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Please don't say anything weird, okay?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Anything weird? Like how you sometimes call me
"daddy" when you're half asleep?

text_block_list.name: City's Fan
text_block_list.text: Ooohh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! I don't do that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you do. You never called me "Mommy," but
one time you did call me "Bunny."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: "Bunny"? ...Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's the name of a doll I wanted when I was a
child! I was too stubborn to admit it though...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And that's why you still dream about it? Wow,
how cute.

text_block_list.name: City's Fan
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ack! What are you screaming for?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This is your doing.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! This one is actually good information—it's
about City's routine!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, what are you—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She really keeps all the letters and gifts she
receives from you fans, you know.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes she comes to our room ready to drop
dead 'cause she's so tired, and then she falls
asleep with all your letters in her arms!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: B-Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What, was I not supposed to share that? It's a
super heartwarming story!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
See, people tend to think you're all cool and
distant, but this is your chance to change that
impression!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But that's not the impression I want to give!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: City reads all our letters... That's so sweet!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I know, I'm so happy! City's got such a big heart!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Well, they look pretty happy about it...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh. End me, please.

After the Q and A, the meet and greet continues
with one-on-one conversations.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Um, when I saw you run, I became an even bigger
fan!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Why did you quit the Triple Tiara? It seemed like
the perfect fit for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well... that's because...
After the event...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, um... could I have some alone time? There's
something I want to think through.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Mm.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: The reason why I quit the Tiara tour...
